v.NIV: Isn’t it enough that you have brought us up out of a land flowing with milk and honey to kill us in the wilderness? And now you also want to lord it over us!

v.SAENEW: 우리를 젖과 꿀이 흐르는 땅에서 이끌어 내어, 이 광야에서 죽이는 것으로도 부족하단 말이오? 이제 당신은 우리 위에 군주처럼 군림하기까지 할 셈이오?
v.WLB: 당신이 이 광야에서 죽이려고 우리를 젖과 꿀이 흐르는 땅에서 데리고 나온 것으로 충분하지 않느냐? 이제는 기어이 우리를 지배하려고까지 하느냐?

v.CNV: 况且你没有把我们领到流奶与蜜的地，也没有把田地和葡萄园给我们作产业。难道你要把这些人的眼睛剜出来吗？我们不上去。”
v.ESV: Moreover, you have not brought us into a land flowing with milk and honey, nor given us inheritance of fields and vineyards. Will you put out the eyes of these men? We will not come up.”
v.GAE: 이뿐 아니라 네가 우리를 젖과 꿀이 흐르는 땅으로 인도하여 들이지도 아니하고 밭도 포도원도 우리에게 기업으로 주지 아니하니 네가 이 사람들의 눈을 빼려느냐 우리는 올라가지 아니하겠노라
v.KJV: Moreover thou hast not brought us into a land that floweth with milk and honey, or given us inheritance of fields and vineyards: wilt thou put out the eyes of these men? we will not come up.
v.NASB: 'Indeed, you have not brought us into a land flowing with milk and honey, nor have you given us an inheritance of fields and vineyards. Would you put out the eyes of these men? We will not come up!'
v.NIV: Moreover, you haven’t brought us into a land flowing with milk and honey or given us an inheritance of fields and vineyards. Do you want to treat these men like slaves ? No, we will not come! ”
v.NRSV: It is clear you have not brought us into a land flowing with milk and honey, or given us an inheritance of fields and vineyards. Would you put out the eyes of these men? We will not come!”
v.SAENEW: 더욱이 당신은 우리를, 젖과 꿀이 흐르는 땅으로 인도하지도 못했소. 밭과 포도원도 우리에게 유산으로 주지 못하였소. 당신은 이 사람들의 눈을 뺄 작정이오? 우리는 못 가오."
v.WLB: 더구나 당신은 젖과 꿀이 흐르는 땅에 우리를 들어가게 해 주지도 않았고 우리에게 밭과 포도원을 유산으로 주지도 못했다. 당신이 이 사람들의 눈을 파내려고 하느냐? 우리는 결코 가지 않겠다.”

v.CNV: 于是摩西大怒，对耶和华说：“求你不要悦纳他们的礼物，我没有夺过他们一头驴，也没有害过他们一个人。”
v.ESV: And Moses was very angry and said to the Lord , “Do not respect their offering. I have not taken one donkey from them, and I have not harmed one of them.”
v.GAE: 모세가 심히 노하여 여호와께 여짜오되 주는 그들의 헌물을 돌아보지 마옵소서 나는 그들의 나귀 한 마리도 빼앗지 아니하였고 그들 중의 한 사람도 해하지 아니하였나이다 하고
v.KJV: And Moses was very wroth, and said unto the LORD, Respect not thou their offering: I have not taken one ass from them, neither have I hurt one of them.
v.NASB: Then Moses became very angry and said to the LORD, 'Do not regard their offering! I have not taken a single donkey from them, nor have I done harm to any of them.'
v.NIV: Then Moses became very angry and said to the Lord , “Do not accept their offering. I have not taken so much as a donkey from them, nor have I wronged any of them.”
v.NRSV: Moses was very angry and said to the LORD, “Pay no attention to their offering. I have not taken one donkey from them, and I have not harmed any one of them.”
v.SAENEW: 모세는 몹시 화가 나서 주님께 아뢰었다. "저 사람들이 바치는 제물은 바라보지도 마십시오. 저는 저 사람들에게서 나귀 한 마리도 빼앗은 일이 없습니다. 저들 가운데 어느 한 사람에게도 잘못한 일이 없습니다."
v.WLB: 모세는 몹시 화가 나서 여호와께 말했습니다. “그들의 제사를 받지 마십시오. 저는 그들에게서 나귀 하나 받은 것이 없고 그들 가운데 어느 누구에게 잘못한 것이 없습니다.”

v.CNV: 摩西对可拉说：“明天你和你的同党，以及亚伦，都要站在耶和华面前。
v.ESV: And Moses said to Korah, “Be present, you and all your company, before the Lord , you and they, and Aaron, tomorrow.
v.GAE: 이에 모세가 고라에게 이르되 너와 너의 온 무리는 아론과 함께 내일 여호와 앞으로 나아오되
v.KJV: And Moses said unto Korah, Be thou and all thy company before the LORD, thou, and they, and Aaron, to morrow:
v.NASB: Moses said to Korah, 'You and all your company be present before the LORD tomorrow, both you and they along with Aaron.
v.NIV: Moses said to Korah, “You and all your followers are to appear before the Lord tomorrow—you and they and Aaron.
v.NRSV: And Moses said to Korah, “As for you and all your company, be present tomorrow before the LORD, you and they and Aaron;
v.SAENEW: 모세가 고라에게 말하였다. "당신과 당신의 모든 사람은 내일 주님 앞에 나오시오. 당신과 그들과 아론이 함께 설 것이오.
v.WLB: 모세가 고라에게 말했습니다. “너와 네 무리들이 내일 여호와 앞에 서게 될 것이다. 너와 그들과 아론이 함께 말이다.

v.CNV: 你们各人要拿着自己的香炉，把香盛在上面；你们各人要把自己的香炉带到耶和华面前，共二百五十个香炉；你和亚伦也各人拿着自己的香炉。”
v.ESV: And let every one of you take his censer and put incense on it, and every one of you bring before the Lord his censer, 250 censers; you also, and Aaron, each his censer.”
v.GAE: 너희는 제각기 향로를 들고 그 위에 향을 얹고 각 사람이 그 향로를 여호와 앞으로 가져오라 향로는 모두 이백오십 개라 너와 아론도 각각 향로를 가지고 올지니라
v.KJV: And take every man his censer, and put incense in them, and bring ye before the LORD every man his censer, two hundred and fifty censers; thou also, and Aaron, each of you his censer.
v.NASB: 'Each of you take his firepan and put incense on it, and each of you bring his censer before the LORD, two hundred and fifty firepans; also you and Aaron shall each bring his firepan.'
v.NIV: Each man is to take his censer and put incense in it—250 censers in all—and present it before the Lord . You and Aaron are to present your censers also. ”
v.NRSV: and let each one of you take his censer, and put incense on it, and each one of you present his censer before the LORD, two hundred fifty censers; you also, and Aaron, each his censer.”
v.SAENEW: 각자 자기의 향로를 들고, 그 안에 향을 담아가지고, 주님 앞으로 나와야 하오. 각자가 향로를 가지고 오면, 향로는 모두 이백오십 개가 될 것이오. 당신과 아론도 각자 향로를 가져 와야 하오."
v.WLB: 각 사람은 자기 향로를 가져다가 그 안에 향을 넣어라. 그러면 향로가 다 합쳐 250개가 될 것이고 그것을 여호와 앞에 드려라. 너와 아론도 각자 자신의 향로를 드려라.”

v.CNV: 于是，他们各人拿着自己的香炉，盛上火，加上香，与摩西和亚伦一同站在会幕门口。
v.ESV: So every man took his censer and put fire in them and laid incense on them and stood at the entrance of the tent of meeting with Moses and Aaron.
v.GAE: 그들이 제각기 향로를 가져다가 불을 담고 향을 그 위에 얹고 모세와 아론과 더불어 회막 문에 서니라
v.KJV: And they took every man his censer, and put fire in them, and laid incense thereon, and stood in the door of the tabernacle of the congregation with Moses and Aaron.
v.NASB: So they each took his own censer and put fire on it, and laid incense on it; and they stood at the doorway of the tent of meeting, with Moses and Aaron.
v.NIV: So each of them took his censer, put burning coals and incense in it, and stood with Moses and Aaron at the entrance to the tent of meeting.
v.NRSV: So each man took his censer, and they put fire in the censers and laid incense on them, and they stood at the entrance of the tent of meeting with Moses and Aaron.
v.SAENEW: 그래서 각자 자기의 향로를 가지고 와서, 거기에 불을 피우고, 그 안에 향을 넣어서, 회막 어귀에 섰다. 모세와 아론도 함께 있었다.
v.WLB: 그리하여 각 사람이 자기 향로를 가져다가 그 안에 불과 향을 넣고 모세와 아론과 함께 회막 입구에 섰습니다.

v.CNV: 可拉召聚了全体会众到会幕门口，来攻击摩西和亚伦，耶和华的荣光就向全体会众显现。
v.ESV: Then Korah assembled all the congregation against them at the entrance of the tent of meeting. And the glory of the Lord appeared to all the congregation.
v.GAE: 고라가 온 회중을 회막 문에 모아 놓고 그 두 사람을 대적하려 하매 여호와의 영광이 온 회중에게 나타나시니라
v.KJV: And Korah gathered all the congregation against them unto the door of the tabernacle of the congregation: and the glory of the LORD appeared unto all the congregation.
v.NASB: Thus Korah assembled all the congregation against them at the doorway of the tent of meeting. And the glory of the LORD appeared to all the congregation.
v.NIV: When Korah had gathered all his followers in opposition to them at the entrance to the tent of meeting, the glory of the Lord appeared to the entire assembly.
v.NRSV: Then Korah assembled the whole congregation against them at the entrance of the tent of meeting. And the glory of the LORD appeared to the whole congregation.
v.SAENEW: 고라는 온 회중을 모두 회막 어귀에 모아 두 사람과 대결하게 하였다.갑자기 주님의 영광이 온 회중에게 나타났다.
v.WLB: 고라가 회막 입구에서 그들 반대쪽에 자기 무리를 모으자 여호와의 영광이 온 회중에게 나타났습니다.

v.CNV: 耶和华对摩西和亚伦说：
v.ESV: And the Lord spoke to Moses and to Aaron, saying,
v.GAE: 여호와께서 모세와 아론에게 말씀하여 이르시되
v.KJV: And the LORD spake unto Moses and unto Aaron, saying,
v.NASB: Then the LORD spoke to Moses and Aaron, saying,
v.NIV: The Lord said to Moses and Aaron,
v.NRSV: Then the LORD spoke to Moses and to Aaron, saying:
v.SAENEW: 주님께서 모세와 아론에게 다음과 같이 말씀하셨다.
v.WLB: 여호와께서 모세와 아론에게 말씀하셨습니다.

v.CNV: “你们要离开这会众，我好在眨眼间把他们吞灭。”
v.ESV: “Separate yourselves from among this congregation, that I may consume them in a moment.”
v.GAE: 너희는 이 회중에게서 떠나라 내가 순식간에 그들을 멸하려 하노라
v.KJV: Separate yourselves from among this congregation, that I may consume them in a moment.
v.NASB: 'Separate yourselves from among this congregation, that I may consume them instantly.'
v.NIV: “Separate yourselves from this assembly so I can put an end to them at once.”
v.NRSV: Separate yourselves from this congregation, so that I may consume them in a moment.
v.SAENEW: "너희는 이 회중에게서 따로 떨어져라. 내가 그들을 순식간에 없애 버리겠다."
v.WLB: “너희 둘은 이 회중에게서 떨어지라. 내가 그들을 단번에 끝장낼 것이다.”

v.CNV: 摩西和亚伦就俯伏在地，说：“　神啊，万人之灵的　神啊，一人犯罪，你就要向全体会众发怒吗？”
v.ESV: And they fell on their faces and said, “O God, the God of the spirits of all flesh, shall one man sin, and will you be angry with all the congregation?”
v.GAE: 그 두 사람이 엎드려 이르되 하나님이여 모든 육체의 생명의 하나님이여 한 사람이 범죄하였거늘 온 회중에게 진노하시나이까
v.KJV: And they fell upon their faces, and said, O God, the God of the spirits of all flesh, shall one man sin, and wilt thou be wroth with all the congregation?
v.NASB: But they fell on their faces and said, 'O God, God of the spirits of all flesh, when one man sins, will You be angry with the entire congregation?'
v.NIV: But Moses and Aaron fell facedown and cried out, “O God, the God who gives breath to all living things, will you be angry with the entire assembly when only one man sins?”
v.NRSV: They fell on their faces, and said, “O God, the God of the spirits of all flesh, shall one person sin and you become angry with the whole congregation?”
v.SAENEW: 그러나 모세와 아론이 땅에 엎드려 부르짖었다. "하나님, 모든 육체에 숨을 불어넣어 주시는 하나님, 죄는 한 사람이 지었는데, 어찌 온 회중에게 진노하십니까?"
v.WLB: 그러나 모세와 아론이 얼굴을 땅에 대고 엎드려 말했습니다. “하나님이여, 모든 육체의 영들의 하나님이여, 오직 한 사람만이 죄를 지었는데 온 회중에게 진노를 하십니까?”

v.CNV: 耶和华对摩西说：
v.ESV: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying,
v.GAE: 여호와께서 모세에게 말씀하여 이르시되
v.KJV: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,
v.NASB: Then the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
v.NIV: Then the Lord said to Moses,
v.NRSV: And the LORD spoke to Moses, saying:
v.SAENEW: 주님께서 모세에게 말씀하셨다.
v.WLB: 그러자 여호와께서 모세에게 말씀하셨습니다.

v.CNV: “你要吩咐会众说：‘你们要离开可拉、大坍、亚比兰帐幕的四周。’”
v.ESV: “Say to the congregation, Get away from the dwelling of Korah, Dathan, and Abiram.”
v.GAE: 회중에게 명령하여 이르기를 너희는 고라와 다단과 아비람의 장막 사방에서 떠나라 하라
v.KJV: Speak unto the congregation, saying, Get you up from about the tabernacle of Korah, Dathan, and Abiram.
v.NASB: 'Speak to the congregation, saying, 'Get back from around the dwellings of Korah, Dathan and Abiram.''
v.NIV: “Say to the assembly, ‘Move away from the tents of Korah, Dathan and Abiram.’”
v.NRSV: Say to the congregation: Get away from the dwellings of Korah, Dathan, and Abiram.
v.SAENEW: "너는 회중에게 고라와 다단과 아비람의 거처 가까이에서 떠나라고 하여라."
v.WLB: “‘고라와 다단과 아비람의 장막에서 떨어지라’고 회중에게 말하여라.”

v.CNV: 于是摩西起来，到大坍和亚比兰那里去；以色列的长老也随着他去了。
v.ESV: Then Moses rose and went to Dathan and Abiram, and the elders of Israel followed him.
v.GAE: 모세가 일어나 다단과 아비람에게로 가니 이스라엘 장로들이 따랐더라
v.KJV: And Moses rose up and went unto Dathan and Abiram; and the elders of Israel followed him.
v.NASB: Then Moses arose and went to Dathan and Abiram, with the elders of Israel following him,
v.NIV: Moses got up and went to Dathan and Abiram, and the elders of Israel followed him.
v.NRSV: So Moses got up and went to Dathan and Abiram; the elders of Israel followed him.
v.SAENEW: 모세가 일어나 다단과 아비람에게로 가니, 이스라엘 장로들도 그를 따랐다.
v.WLB: 모세가 일어나 다단과 아비람에게 가는데 이스라엘 장로들이 그를 따라갔습니다.

v.CNV: 摩西告诉会众：“你们要远离这些恶人的帐幕，凡是他们的东西，你们都不可摸，免得你们因他们的一切罪恶同遭毁灭。”
v.ESV: And he spoke to the congregation, saying, “Depart, please, from the tents of these wicked men, and touch nothing of theirs, lest you be swept away with all their sins.”
v.GAE: 모세가 회중에게 말하여 이르되 이 악인들의 장막에서 떠나고 그들의 물건은 아무 것도 만지지 말라 그들의 모든 죄중에서 너희도 멸망할까 두려워하노라 하매
v.KJV: And he spake unto the congregation, saying, Depart, I pray you, from the tents of these wicked men, and touch nothing of theirs, lest ye be consumed in all their sins.
v.NASB: and he spoke to the congregation, saying, 'Depart now from the tents of these wicked men, and touch nothing that belongs to them, or you will be swept away in all their sin.'
v.NIV: He warned the assembly, “Move back from the tents of these wicked men! Do not touch anything belonging to them, or you will be swept away because of all their sins. ”
v.NRSV: He said to the congregation, “Turn away from the tents of these wicked men, and touch nothing of theirs, or you will be swept away for all their sins.”
v.SAENEW: 그는 회중에게 경고하였다. "당신들은 이 악한 사람들의 장막에서 물러서시오! 그들에게 딸린 어느 것 하나도 건드리지 마시오. 건드렸다가는, 그들의 죄에 휘말려 함께 망할 것이오."
v.WLB: 그가 회중에게 경고했습니다. “이 악한 사람들의 장막에서 물러나라! 그들에게 속한 것은 어느 것이든 만지지 말라. 그렇지 않으면 그들의 모든 죄로 인해 너희가 멸망당할 것이다.”

v.CNV: 于是，众人离开了可拉、大坍、亚比兰帐幕的四周；大坍、亚比兰就带着妻子、儿女和小孩出来，站在自己的帐幕门口。
v.ESV: So they got away from the dwelling of Korah, Dathan, and Abiram. And Dathan and Abiram came out and stood at the door of their tents, together with their wives, their sons, and their little ones.
v.GAE: 무리가 고라와 다단과 아비람의 장막 사방을 떠나고 다단과 아비람은 그들의 처자와 유아들과 함께 나와서 자기 장막 문에 선지라
v.KJV: So they gat up from the tabernacle of Korah, Dathan, and Abiram, on every side: and Dathan and Abiram came out, and stood in the door of their tents, and their wives, and their sons, and their little children.
v.NASB: So they got back from around the dwellings of Korah, Dathan and Abiram; and Dathan and Abiram came out and stood at the doorway of their tents, along with their wives and their sons and their little ones.
v.NIV: So they moved away from the tents of Korah, Dathan and Abiram. Dathan and Abiram had come out and were standing with their wives, children and little ones at the entrances to their tents.
v.NRSV: So they got away from the dwellings of Korah, Dathan, and Abiram; and Dathan and Abiram came out and stood at the entrance of their tents, together with their wives, their children, and their little ones.

v.NIV: as the Lord directed him through Moses. This was to remind the Israelites that no one except a descendant of Aaron should come to burn incense before the Lord , or he would become like Korah and his followers.
v.NRSV: a reminder to the Israelites that no outsider, who is not of the descendants of Aaron, shall approach to offer incense before the LORD, so as not to become like Korah and his company — just as the LORD had said to him through Moses.
v.SAENEW: 엘르아살은, 주님께서 모세를 시켜 말씀하신 대로 다 하였다. 그가 이렇게 한 것은, 아론 자손이 아닌 다른 사람들은, 어느 누구도 절대로 주 앞에 가까이 가서 분향할 수 없다는 것과, 누구든지 그렇게 하였다가는 고라와 그와 합세하였던 사람들처럼 된다는 것을, 이스라엘 자손에게 상기시키려 한 것이다.
v.WLB: 이는 고라와 그의 무리처럼 되지 않으려거든 아론의 자손이 아닌 다른 사람이 여호와께 향을 드리러 나와서는 안 된다는 것을 기억시키기 위한 것이었습니다. 여호와께서 모세를 통해 엘르아살에게 명하신 그대로였습니다.

v.CNV: 第二天，以色列全体会众都向摩西和亚伦发怨言，说：“你们害死了耶和华的子民。”
v.ESV: But on the next day all the congregation of the people of Israel grumbled against Moses and against Aaron, saying, “You have killed the people of the Lord .”
v.GAE: 이튿날 이스라엘 자손의 온 회중이 모세와 아론을 원망하여 이르되 너희가 여호와의 백성을 죽였도다 하고
v.KJV: But on the morrow all the congregation of the children of Israel murmured against Moses and against Aaron, saying, Ye have killed the people of the LORD.
v.NASB: But on the next day all the congregation of the sons of Israel grumbled against Moses and Aaron, saying, 'You are the ones who have caused the death of the LORD'S people.'
v.NIV: The next day the whole Israelite community grumbled against Moses and Aaron. “You have killed the Lord ’s people,” they said.
v.NRSV: On the next day, however, the whole congregation of the Israelites rebelled against Moses and against Aaron, saying, “You have killed the people of the LORD.”
v.SAENEW: 이튿날, 이스라엘 자손의 온 회중이 모세와 아론에게 항거하면서 말하였다. "당신들이 주님의 백성을 죽였소."
v.WLB: 다음날 온 이스라엘 회중이 모세와 아론에게 불평을 하며 말했습니다. “당신들이 여호와의 사람들을 죽였습니다.”

v.CNV: 会众聚集攻击摩西和亚伦的时候，他们转身向会幕观看，见有云彩遮盖会幕，耶和华的荣光显现出来。
v.ESV: And when the congregation had assembled against Moses and against Aaron, they turned toward the tent of meeting. And behold, the cloud covered it, and the glory of the Lord appeared.
v.GAE: 회중이 모여 모세와 아론을 칠 때에 회막을 바라본즉 구름이 회막을 덮었고 여호와의 영광이 나타났더라
v.KJV: And it came to pass, when the congregation was gathered against Moses and against Aaron, that they looked toward the tabernacle of the congregation: and, behold, the cloud covered it, and the glory of the LORD appeared.
v.NASB: It came about, however, when the congregation had assembled against Moses and Aaron, that they turned toward the tent of meeting, and behold, the cloud covered it and the glory of the LORD appeared.
v.NIV: But when the assembly gathered in opposition to Moses and Aaron and turned toward the tent of meeting, suddenly the cloud covered it and the glory of the Lord appeared.
v.NRSV: And when the congregation had assembled against them, Moses and Aaron turned toward the tent of meeting; the cloud had covered it and the glory of the LORD appeared.
v.SAENEW: 온 회중이 모세와 아론을 규탄할 때에, 모세와 아론이 회막 쪽을 바라보니, 회막에 갑자기 구름이 덮이고, 주님의 영광이 거기에 나타났다.
v.WLB: 회중이 모세와 아론을 대항해 모였고 모세와 아론이 회막 쪽을 쳐다보았을 때 구름이 회막을 덮으면서 여호와의 영광이 나타났습니다.

v.CNV: 摩西和亚伦就来到会幕前面。
v.ESV: And Moses and Aaron came to the front of the tent of meeting,
v.GAE: 모세와 아론이 회막 앞에 이르매
v.KJV: And Moses and Aaron came before the tabernacle of the congregation.
v.NASB: Then Moses and Aaron came to the front of the tent of meeting,
v.NIV: Then Moses and Aaron went to the front of the tent of meeting,
v.NRSV: Then Moses and Aaron came to the front of the tent of meeting,
v.SAENEW: 모세와 아론이 회막 앞으로 가니,
v.WLB: 모세와 아론이 회막 앞으로 나아가자

v.CNV: 耶和华吩咐摩西说：
v.ESV: and the Lord spoke to Moses, saying,
v.GAE: 여호와께서 모세에게 말씀하여 이르시되
v.KJV: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,
v.NASB: and the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
v.NIV: and the Lord said to Moses,
v.NRSV: and the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
v.SAENEW: 주님께서 모세에게 말씀하셨다.
v.WLB: 여호와께서 모세에게 말씀하셨습니다.

v.CNV: “你们要离开这会众，我好在眨眼间把他们消灭。”他们二人就俯伏在地。
v.ESV: “Get away from the midst of this congregation, that I may consume them in a moment.” And they fell on their faces.
v.GAE: 너희는 이 회중에게서 떠나라 내가 순식간에 그들을 멸하려 하노라 하시매 그 두 사람이 엎드리니라
v.KJV: Get you up from among this congregation, that I may consume them as in a moment. And they fell upon their faces.
v.NASB: 'Get away from among this congregation, that I may consume them instantly.' Then they fell on their faces.
v.NIV: “Get away from this assembly so I can put an end to them at once.” And they fell facedown.
v.NRSV: “Get away from this congregation, so that I may consume them in a moment.” And they fell on their faces.
v.SAENEW: "너희 두 사람은 이 회중에게서 떠나라. 그들을 내가 순식간에 없애 버리겠다." 이 말을 듣고, 두 사람이 땅에 엎드렸다.
v.WLB: “이 회중에게서 떠나라. 내가 저들을 단번에 끝장내겠다.” 그러자 그들이 얼굴을 땅에 대고 엎드렸습니다.

v.CNV: 摩西对亚伦说：“你要拿着香炉，把坛上的火盛在里头，又加上香，快快带到会众那里去，为他们赎罪，因为有震怒从耶和华面前出来，瘟疫已经开始了。”
v.ESV: And Moses said to Aaron, “Take your censer, and put fire on it from off the altar and lay incense on it and carry it quickly to the congregation and make atonement for them, for wrath has gone out from the Lord ; the plague has begun.”
v.GAE: 이에 모세가 아론에게 이르되 너는 향로를 가져다가 제단의 불을 그것에 담고 그 위에 향을 피워 가지고 급히 회중에게로 가서 그들을 위하여 속죄하라 여호와께서 진노하셨으므로 염병이 시작되었음이니라
v.KJV: And Moses said unto Aaron, Take a censer, and put fire therein from off the altar, and put on incense, and go quickly unto the congregation, and make an atonement for them: for there is wrath gone out from the LORD; the plague is begun.
v.NASB: Moses said to Aaron, 'Take your censer and put in it fire from the altar, and lay incense on it; then bring it quickly to the congregation and make atonement for them, for wrath has gone forth from the LORD, the plague has begun!'
v.NIV: Then Moses said to Aaron, “Take your censer and put incense in it, along with burning coals from the altar, and hurry to the assembly to make atonement for them. Wrath has come out from the Lord ; the plague has started.”
v.NRSV: Moses said to Aaron, “Take your censer, put fire on it from the altar and lay incense on it, and carry it quickly to the congregation and make atonement for them. For wrath has gone out from the LORD; the plague has begun.”
v.SAENEW: 모세가 아론에게 말하였다. "형님께서는, 향로에 제단 불을 담고, 그 위에 향을 피워, 빨리 회중에게로 가서, 그들을 위하여 속죄의 예식을 베푸십시오. 주님께서 진노하셔서, 재앙이 시작되었습니다."
v.WLB: 그리고 모세가 아론에게 말했습니다. “형님의 향로를 가져다가 그 안에 제단에서 가져온 불과 함께 향을 넣고 빨리 회중에게로 가서 그들을 위해 속죄하십시오. 여호와로부터 진노가 이르러서 재앙이 시작됐습니다.”

v.CNV: 亚伦照着摩西吩咐的把香炉拿来，跑到会众中间，果然，瘟疫已经在人民中间开始了；他就加上香，为人民赎罪。
v.ESV: So Aaron took it as Moses said and ran into the midst of the assembly. And behold, the plague had already begun among the people. And he put on the incense and made atonement for the people.
v.GAE: 아론이 모세의 명령을 따라 향로를 가지고 회중에게로 달려간즉 백성 중에 염병이 시작되었는지라 이에 백성을 위하여 속죄하고
v.KJV: And Aaron took as Moses commanded, and ran into the midst of the congregation; and, behold, the plague was begun among the people: and he put on incense, and made an atonement for the people.
v.NASB: Then Aaron took it as Moses had spoken, and ran into the midst of the assembly, for behold, the plague had begun among the people. So he put on the incense and made atonement for the people.
v.NIV: So Aaron did as Moses said, and ran into the midst of the assembly. The plague had already started among the people, but Aaron offered the incense and made atonement for them.
v.NRSV: So Aaron took it as Moses had ordered, and ran into the middle of the assembly, where the plague had already begun among the people. He put on the incense, and made atonement for the people.
v.SAENEW: 아론이 모세의 말을 듣고, 향로를 가지고 회중에게로 달려갔다. 백성 사이에는 이미 염병이 번지고 있었다. 아론이 백성에게 속죄의 예식을 베풀었다.
v.WLB: 모세가 말한 대로 아론이 회중 가운데로 달려 들어갔습니다. 재앙이 백성들 사이에 막 시작됐는데 아론이 향을 드려 그들을 위해 속죄했습니다.

v.CNV: 他站在死人与活人中间，瘟疫就止住了。
v.ESV: And he stood between the dead and the living, and the plague was stopped.
v.GAE: 죽은 자와 산 자 사이에 섰을 때에 염병이 그치니라
v.KJV: And he stood between the dead and the living; and the plague was stayed.
v.NASB: He took his stand between the dead and the living, so that the plague was checked.
v.NIV: He stood between the living and the dead, and the plague stopped.
v.NRSV: He stood between the dead and the living; and the plague was stopped.
v.SAENEW: 아론이 살아 있는 사람과 죽은 사람 사이에 서니, 재앙이 그쳤다.
v.WLB: 그리고 그가 살아 있는 사람들과 죽은 사람들 사이에 서자 재앙이 멈추었습니다.

v.CNV: 除了因可拉事件死亡的以外，因瘟疫死亡的有一万四千七百人。
v.ESV: Now those who died in the plague were 14,700, besides those who died in the affair of Korah.
v.GAE: 고라의 일로 죽은 자 외에 염병에 죽은 자가 만 사천칠백 명이었더라
v.KJV: Now they that died in the plague were fourteen thousand and seven hundred, beside them that died about the matter of Korah.
v.NASB: But those who died by the plague were 14,700, besides those who died on account of Korah.
v.NIV: But 14,700 people died from the plague, in addition to those who had died because of Korah.
v.NRSV: Those who died by the plague were fourteen thousand seven hundred, besides those who died in the affair of Korah.
v.SAENEW: 이 염병으로 죽은 사람이 만 사천칠백 명이나 되었다. 이것은 고라의 일로 죽은 사람 수는 뺀 것이다.
v.WLB: 그러나 고라 때문에 죽은 사람 외에 1만 4,700명의 사람들이 이 재앙으로 죽었습니다.

v.CNV: 亚伦回到会幕门口摩西那里，瘟疫已经止住了。（本章第36-50节在《马索拉抄本》为 17:1-15）
v.ESV: And Aaron returned to Moses at the entrance of the tent of meeting, when the plague was stopped.
v.GAE: 염병이 그치매 아론이 회막 문 모세에게로 돌아오니라
v.KJV: And Aaron returned unto Moses unto the door of the tabernacle of the congregation: and the plague was stayed.
v.NASB: Then Aaron returned to Moses at the doorway of the tent of meeting, for the plague had been checked.
v.NIV: Then Aaron returned to Moses at the entrance to the tent of meeting, for the plague had stopped.
v.NRSV: When the plague was stopped, Aaron returned to Moses at the entrance of the tent of meeting.
v.SAENEW: 재앙이 그치자, 아론은 회막 어귀에 있는 모세에게로 돌아왔다.
v.WLB: 재앙이 멈추자 아론이 회막 입구에 있는 모세에게 돌아왔습니다.
